$comment: Per-dimension judge enforcement (PLAN-004 AC-4). A dimension may be 'blocking' ONLY if it cites a calibration report that evals/harness/promotion-check.mjs accepts: report exists, is <=90 days old, and its per-dimension promoteEligible is true (judge-vs-reference kappa >= threshold; human dimensions also require human-vs-human kappa >= 0.4). Judges START advisory. Do not hand-flip a dimension to 'blocking' without a report — CI (promotion-check) will reject it.

droppedDimensions.$comment: PLAN-005 AC-7: dimensions deliberately REMOVED from a judge's rubric because a deterministic layer now owns them. Recorded here as an auditable scope-reduction trail — each maps to the layer that replaced it. Do not re-add these to a judge; a subjective re-judgement would just duplicate a mechanical check.
droppedDimensions.vision-judge/token-adherence: replaced by tests/design/token-conformance.spec.ts (AC-6, reads tokens.json) + eslint-plugin-tailwindcss no-arbitrary-value (AC-2)
droppedDimensions.vision-judge/slop-patterns: replaced by the Impeccable slop tier — .claude/hooks/impeccable-tier.mjs blocks slop on write (AC-3)
